title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: What do you prefer – city life or country life? Why?
What do you think are the main advantages of living in a large city?
Is there enough green space where you live?
How important is public transport to your daily life?
What would you say is the biggest problem in the area where you live?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think the quality of life in cities is getting better or worse?
What's the most important thing a city needs to attract young people?
Do you think people who grow up in the countryside have a different outlook on life?
